1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→set -e
     3→
     4→# 1. Start Postgres + ClickHouse (idempotent)
     5→docker compose up -d --wait
     6→
     7→# 2. Run Postgres migrations (idempotent — skips already-applied)
     8→PG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel \
     9→  bun run --cwd packages/sql-schema migrate
    10→
    11→# 3. Start API + Web in parallel with local env vars
    12→export PG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel
    13→export BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=local-dev-secret-that-is-at-least-32-chars-long
    14→export CLICKHOUSE_URL=http://localhost:8123
    15→export REDACTED
    16→export APP_URL=http://localhost:4011
    17→
    18→# Run API and Web in parallel, kill both on Ctrl+C
    19→bun --watch apps/api/src/index.ts &
    20→API_PID=$!
    21→bun run --cwd apps/web dev &
    22→WEB_PID=$!
    23→
    24→trap "kill $API_PID $WEB_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT
    25→wait
    26→

content.content:
1→name: CI
     2→
     3→on:
     4→  pull_request:
     5→  push:
     6→    branches:
     7→      - main
     8→
     9→jobs:
    10→  verify:
    11→    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    12→    steps:
    13→      - name: Checkout
    14→        uses: actions/checkout@v4
    15→
    16→      - name: Setup Bun
    17→        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
    18→        with:
    19→          bun-version: 1.3.5
    20→
    21→      - name: Cache bun install
    22→        uses: actions/cache@v4
    23→        with:
    24→          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
    25→          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lock') }}
    26→          restore-keys: |
    27→            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
    28→
    29→      - name: Install dependencies
    30→        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
    31→
    32→      - name: Verify lockfile unchanged
    33→        run: git diff --exit-code bun.lock
    34→
    35→      - name: Verify
    36→        run: bunx turbo run lint check-types test build
    37→        env:
    38→          PG_CONNECTION_STRING: ${{ secrets.PG_CONNECTION_STRING }}
    39→          CLICKHOUSE_URL: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_URL }}
    40→          CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME }}
    41→          CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD }}
    42→          CLICKHOUSE_DB: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_DB }}
    43→
    44→  deploy:
    45→    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    46→    needs: verify
    47→    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    48→    steps:
    49→      - name: Checkout
    50→        uses: actions/checkout@v4
    51→
    52→      - name: Setup Fly.io
    53→        uses: superfly/flyctl-actions/setup-flyctl@master
    54→
    55→      - name: Deploy
    56→        run: flyctl deploy --remote-only
    57→        env:
    58→          FLY_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FLY_API_TOKEN }}
    59→

# ============================================================================
# Rudel — Environment Variables
# ============================================================================
# Copy this file to .env and fill in the values.
# For local development with Docker (bun run dev:local), all defaults work
# out of the box — you only need to set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.
# ============================================================================

# --- Required ----------------------------------------------------------------

# Postgres connection string (Neon in production, local Docker in dev)
PG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel

# Auth secret used by better-auth for signing tokens/cookies.
# Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=

# --- ClickHouse ---------------------------------------------------------------

# ClickHouse HTTP endpoint. Local Docker uses port 8123; production is behind
# a reverse proxy on port 443 (https://...).
CLICKHOUSE_URL=http://localhost:8123

# ClickHouse credentials. The API accepts both CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME and
# CLICKHOUSE_USER (prefers CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME). Local Docker default password
# is "clickhouse".
CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME=default
CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=

# ClickHouse database name. Used by chkit tooling for schema migrations.
# Not read by the API at runtime (hardcoded to "rudel" in queries).
# CLICKHOUSE_DB=rudel

# --- API Server ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Base URL of the API server. Used as better-auth's baseURL and automatically
# added to trusted origins. Default: http://localhost:4010
# APP_URL=http://localhost:4010

# CORS allowed origin. Requests with a different Origin header won't get CORS
# headers. Default: http://localhost:4011
# ALLOWED_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4011

# Comma-separated list of trusted origins for better-auth CSRF protection.
# APP_URL is automatically appended. Default: http://localhost:4011
# TRUSTED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:4011

# Server listen port. Default: 4010. Overridden to 3000 in the Docker image.
# PORT=4010

# Directory for static file serving (SPA). Relative to apps/api/.
# In production, the web app is built and copied to apps/api/public/.
# Default: public
# STATIC_DIR=public

# --- OAuth Providers (optional) -----------------------------------------------
# Enable social login by providing OAuth credentials. If not set, only
# email/password authentication is available.

# Google OAuth
# GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
# GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=

# GitHub OAuth
# GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=
# GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=

# --- Integrations (optional) --------------------------------------------------

# Slack incoming webhook URL. When set, sends a notification to the channel
# on every new user signup.
# SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/...
